entry.content:

[Bug]: ntfy notifications are missing domain name. #83
### Environment Docker (self-hosted) ### Version 0.1.4 ### Describe the Issue When an ntfy notification is received, it is impossible to see which …

Adds FCaptcha to the Self-Hosted Network Security section as a privacy-respecting, self-hosted CAPTCHA and bot detection tool.
